description: Developmental milestones from conception up to 36 months of age.  Exploration of child care, including access and quality of care, as major influences on the development of young children and families in the US.  Observation of infant development in real-time and evaluation of child care program quality.

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: HDFS 262(or HDFS 362 prior to Fall 2023),ED PSYCH 320, orPSYCH 460
